One Pot Italian Quinoa and Lentils

Ingredients

  • 400g Lentils
  • 400g Quinoa
  • 50g Sun-dried Tomatoes
  • 1 Tsp Salt
  • 1 Tsp Thyme
  • 1L Vegetable Broth
  • 200g Spinach
  • 1 Tbsp Lemon Juice
  • ½ Tsp Black Pepper
  • 400ml Chopped Tomatoes (Canned)

Instructions

  1. Add lentils, quinoa, salt, thyme and broth. Bring to boil, reduce heat, cook for 30 mins.
  2. Add tomatoes, spinach, lemon juice, black pepper and salt. Cook and stir for 5 mins.

Adapted from thefullhelping.com
